title: Require Mapgen Doc Ground Truth Anchors Heading
forbids: non-router canonical MapGen Markdown docs without a Ground truth anchors section
why: MapGen docs are enforcement inputs; the source-shape requirement for anchor sections belongs in Grit while target resolution stays in the docs validator.
remediate: Add a ## Ground truth anchors section or mark the document as an intentional legacy router.
message: Non-router canonical MapGen docs must include a ## Ground truth anchors section.
